# samsungcloudplatformv2_multinodegpucluster_gpunode (Data Source)

Show GPU Node

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "samsungcloudplatformv2" {
}

data "samsungcloudplatformv2_multinodegpucluster_gpunode" "gpunode" {
  id = var.id
}

output "gpunode" {
  value = data.samsungcloudplatformv2_multinodegpucluster_gpunode.gpunode
}


variable "id" {
  type    = string
  default = ""
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) GPU Node ID

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (String) Account ID
  - example: f5c8e56a4d9b49a8bd89e14758a32d53
- `cluster_fabric_id` (String) Cluster Fabric ID
  - example: 20c507a036c447cdb3b19468d8ea62ac
- `cluster_fabric_name` (String) Cluster Fabric name
  - example: cluster001
- `created_at` (String) Created At
  - example: 2024-05-17T00:23:17Z
- `created_by` (String) Created By
  - example: 90dddfc2b1e04edba54ba2b41539a9ac
- `gpu_node_name` (String) GPU Node name
  - example: gpu-node-001
- `image_id` (String) Image ID
  - example: IMAGE-7XFMaJpLsapKvskFMjCtmm
- `image_version` (String) Image version
  - example: RHEL 8.7 for BM
- `init_script` (String) Init script
  - example: init script
- `lock_enabled` (Boolean) Use Lock
  - example: true
- `modified_at` (String) Modified At
  - example: 2024-05-17T00:23:17Z
- `modified_by` (String) Modified By
  - example: 90dddfc2b1e04edba54ba2b41539a9ac
- `network_id` (String) Network ID
  - example: ab313c43291e4b678f4bacffe10768ae
- `node_pool_id` (String) Node Pool ID
  - example: POOL001-krw1a
- `os_type` (String) OS type
  - example: WINDOWS
- `pfs_ip` (List of String) PFS IP list
  - example: [10.252.128.2 10.252.128.3]
- `policy_ip` (String) Policy IP
  - example: 192.168.0.1
- `policy_nat` (String) Policy NAT
  - example: 192.168.0.1
- `policy_use_nat` (Boolean) Policy use NAT
  - example: true
- `product_type_id` (String) Product type ID
  - example: f90e8ef54cc2451b825608e9f95f7bcb
- `region_id` (String) Region ID
  - example: kr-west1
- `root_account` (String) Root Account
  - example: rootaccount
- `server_type` (String) Server type
  - example: s1v8m32_metal
- `state` (String) GPU Node state
  - example: RUNNING
- `time_zone` (String) Time Zone
  - example: Asia/Seoul
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID
  - example: e58348b1bc9148e5af86500fd4ef99ca
